creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 248206
patch of security/sssd-devel

>diff -u --new-file --recursive ./sssd-devel.old/Makefile sssd-devel/Makefile
>--- ./sssd-devel.old/Makefile	2024-02-05 10:10:58
>+++ sssd-devel/Makefile	2024-02-05 11:35:40
>@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
> PORTNAME=	sssd
> PORTVERSION=	2.9.4
>+PORTREVISION=	1
> CATEGORIES=	security
> PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-devel
> 
>@@ -33,28 +34,29 @@
> 		libjansson.so:devel/jansson \
> 		libjose.so:net/jose \
> 		libkrb5.so:security/krb5 \
>-		libldb.so:databases/ldb22 \
>-		libndr-krb5pac.so:net/samba416 \
>-		libndr-nbt.so:net/samba416 \
>-		libndr-standard.so:net/samba416 \
>-		libndr.so:net/samba416 \
>+		libldb.so:databases/ldb25 \
>+		libndr-krb5pac.so:net/samba416@noldb \
>+		libndr-nbt.so:net/samba416@noldb \
>+		libndr-standard.so:net/samba416@noldb \
>+		libndr.so:net/samba416@noldb \
> 		libnfs.so:net/libnfs \
> 		libnss3.so:security/nss \
> 		libp11-kit.so:security/p11-kit \
> 		libpcre2-posix.so:devel/pcre2 \
> 		libplds4.so:devel/nspr \
> 		libpopt.so:devel/popt \
>-		libsamba-util.so:net/samba416 \
>+		libsamba-util.so:net/samba416@noldb \
> 		libsasl2.so:security/cyrus-sasl2 \
>-		libsmbclient.so:net/samba416 \
>+		libsmbclient.so:net/samba416@noldb \
> 		libtalloc.so:devel/talloc \
> 		libtdb.so:databases/tdb \
> 		libtevent.so:devel/tevent \
> 		libunistring.so:devel/libunistring \
> 		libuuid.so:misc/e2fsprogs-libuuid

As I mentioned here (https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=276835#c4) perhaps we don't need the noldb (externalldb) flavor at all. Unless the bundled version of ldb is in some way better for Samba, then we should just build with the external ldb by default now that it has landed in the ports tree.

> 
>-RUN_DEPENDS=	cyrus-sasl-gssapi>0:security/cyrus-sasl2-gssapi \
>-		sudo>0:security/sudo
>+#RUN_DEPENDS=	cyrus-sasl-gssapi>0:security/cyrus-sasl2-gssapi \
>+#		sudo>0:security/sudo
>+RUN_DEPENDS=	cyrus-sasl-gssapi>0:security/cyrus-sasl2-gssapi

This part has been fixed independently in via dbb99230a5c36c7d9f9be8b29bb186cec857886d.

> USES=	autoreconf cpe gettext gmake gssapi:bootstrap,flags,mit iconv ldap \
> 	libtool localbase:ldflags pathfix pkgconfig python:3.9+ shebangfix ssl
>diff -u --new-file --recursive ./sssd-devel.old/pkg-plist sssd-devel/pkg-plist
>--- ./sssd-devel.old/pkg-plist	2024-02-05 10:08:37
>+++ sssd-devel/pkg-plist	2024-02-05 16:05:32
>@@ -25,10 +25,7 @@
> lib/nss_sss.so.1
> lib/pam_sss.so
> lib/pam_sss_gss.so
>-%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/SSSDConfig-2.9.2-py%%PYTHON_VER%%.egg-info/PKG-INFO
>-%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/SSSDConfig-2.9.2-py%%PYTHON_VER%%.egg-info/SOURCES.txt
>-%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/SSSDConfig-2.9.2-py%%PYTHON_VER%%.egg-info/dependency_links.txt
>-%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/SSSDConfig-2.9.2-py%%PYTHON_VER%%.egg-info/top_level.txt
>+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/SSSDConfig-2.9.4-py%%PYTHON_VER%%.egg-info

The pkg-plist fixes we could probably commit separately.
